name: Parsnips & Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: Peel and cut into large squares sweet potatoes.
Peel and cut into chunks carrots and parsnips.
Put in a baking dish and cover with orange juice.
Cover with foil and cook in 350 deg oven till everything is Soft (about an hour or so).
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the peeled and chopped vegetables in a baking dish and cover with orange juice.
2. Cover the dish with foil and bake at 350°F until all the ingredients are soft, which should take about an hour.
